hooks.command: echo '--- Code Harness Rules (re-injected after compaction) ---' && find "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/harness/ -name '*.md' ! -name 'playbook.md' ! -name 'evaluator.md' -exec cat {} + && find "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/rules/ -name '*.md' -exec cat {} + 2>/dev/null

echo 'Account quota likely exhausted. Stashing uncommitted work and updating tasks.md.' >&2 && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git stash push -m "harness-autosave-$(date +%s)" 2>/dev/null; echo '{"additionalContext": "You hit rate limits or billing limits. Immediately: 1) Update your claimed task in .harness/tasks.md to remove your claim so another machine can pick it up. 2) git commit and push .harness/tasks.md. 3) Stop."}'
